decisions.decision: Moved v1.1.1 tag twice to include lint fixes

decisions.decision: Added lint jobs as gate for Docker build in CI
decisions.rationale: Lint failures should block releases; change pushed to main, not in v1.1.1 tag (will be picked up by future tags)

next_action: Wait for v1.1.1 CI run to complete (run ID 24801608802 or newer), then verify 5 release artifacts. If all pass, create 82-04-SUMMARY.md and proceed to phase verification.
context_notes: Plans 82-01 through 82-03 fully complete. Plan 82-04 Task 1 (tag push) done. Task 2 is a human-verify checkpoint awaiting CI completion. The v1.1.1 tag has been moved twice: first to fix unused Python/Angular imports, second to fix an additional unused Dict import. CI lint gate (lint -> build-docker-image) was added to main but NOT in the v1.1.1 tag — it will apply to future releases.
